title: calamagrostis freticola
intro: Calamagrostis freticola, also known as Fescue Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Calamagrostis freticola include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
